title: Toggle /teammsg
description: A simple client-side mod that allows you to toggle the /teammsg command for ease of use. Also comes with /reply compatible with vanilla messages.
body:
### A simple client-side mod for toggling the /teammsg command.
### Usage:
- **Use /toggleteammsg or /ttm to toggle whether your chat messages should be sent to the team chat or not**
- **When enabled, type in chat as normal and your messages will be sent into the team chat instead.**
- **If Team messages are enabled, use /allchat <msg> or /ac <msg> to send a message in the regular chat**
- **You can use /r <msg> or /reply <msg> to send a message to the person you last messaged**

### Notes:
- **This mod may not work on servers using custom teams through other plugins/mods**
